findings.title: Deprecated Apache Kafka Dependency
findings.description: The current use of Apache Kafka 2.8 poses a critical risk due to its end-of-life in Q1 2026 and known vulnerabilities. Migration to Kafka 3.7+ is necessary to maintain security and compatibility with the KRaft consensus protocol.
assumptions: Kafka 2.8 will not receive security updates after EOL.

evidence.excerpt: Migrate from deprecated Apache Kafka 2.x to Kafka 3.7+

recommendations: Migrate to Apache Kafka 3.7+ before Q1 2026.

metadata.mitigation: Migrate to a supported version of Kafka.

findings.title: Vendor Lock-in with Proprietary ETL SDK
findings.description: The reliance on VendorX's proprietary ETL SDK creates a dependency risk due to impending price increases and potential service changes following the acquisition. Evaluating open-source alternatives is critical.
assumptions: VendorX will increase prices as announced.

evidence.excerpt: Eliminate vendor lock-in on proprietary transformation engine

recommendations: Evaluate and plan migration to open-source ETL alternatives.

metadata.mitigation: Plan migration to open-source ETL tools.

findings.title: Python 3.9 End-of-Life Migration
findings.description: The pipeline worker services running on Python 3.9 need to be upgraded to Python 3.12 before October 2025. This migration is complicated by incompatible dependencies and requires significant code changes.
assumptions: Python 3.9 will not receive security updates after EOL.

evidence.excerpt: Python 3.9 EOL migration for all pipeline workers

recommendations: Upgrade all pipeline worker services to Python 3.12.

metadata.mitigation: Upgrade to a supported version of Python.

findings.title: End-of-Life Redis Cluster Migration
findings.description: The current single-region Redis cluster needs to be replaced with a multi-region solution due to EOL in March 2026 and performance issues for international customers. This requires evaluating Redis 7+ or alternative solutions.
assumptions: Redis 6 will not be supported after EOL.

evidence.excerpt: Replace single-region Redis cluster with multi-region caching

recommendations: Migrate to a multi-region Redis solution before EOL.

metadata.mitigation: Plan migration to a multi-region caching solution.

summary: Identified 4 risks (2 compliance, 2 security). 1 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (1 blockers, 0 warnings).
